description:
Rewrite Story page for wayfinding MVP.

STRUCTURE (top to bottom):
1. STORY heading
2. Intro: "Fractal was originally dreamed up by Andrew and Priya Rose. They were later joined by many co-conspirators. If you're interested in Fractal's story and where we see it going, you might like the following talks and podcasts."
3. Talk/podcast cards styled like DocumentBadge from Lab page (see src/components/lab/DocumentBadge.tsx). Each card: title, speaker, year, description snippet, link.

TALKS LIST (with URLs from lab-documents.ts data):
- Fooming the Fractal (Tyler Alterman, 2025) — "A template for a civil society you can build with your friends" — URL TBD (placeholder # for now)
- Take Some Responsibility! (Andrew Rose, 2025) — "Andrew gets into the weeds of community building" — https://www.everand.com/podcast/874410520/Take-Some-Responsibility-w-Andrew-Rose-Fractal-NYC-Richard-D-Bartlett
- Hundreds of neighbors share this communal living room (Ulysses Chuang, 2025) — "On how Merlin's Place started, and how you can turn your living room into a third space" — https://supernuclear.substack.com/p/case-study-merlins-place
- Scaling Coliving and Slouching Towards Utopia (Priya Rose, 2024) — "On how Fractal started, and where it's going." — https://open.spotify.com/episode/17rMg7X6JafICSrxkFaCAH
- Or for a more personal telling, watch The Origin Story of Fractal (Priya Rose, 2023) — URL TBD (placeholder # for now)
- Friends, Community, Isolation & Fearlessness (Andrew Rose, 2023) — "How many friends do you look in the eyes per day?" — https://podcasters.spotify.com/pod/show/a-o-o/episodes/019---Andrew-Rose-on-Friends--Community--Isolation---Fearlessness-e24vb4n
- The Network State Conference (Andrew and Priya Rose, 2023) — "Building a neighborhood is a coordination problem, not a money problem." — https://prigoose.substack.com/p/i-gave-a-1000-person-conference-talk

4. Below the cards: "Fractal originally emerged from an online scene of friendly ambitious nerds. If you'd like to have fun online and make friends, read Christine's Guide to TPOT." — https://docs.google.com/document/d/1Bd3PfKDL9pOM7YoxGbRBwO_qOWh6B7u5170Xw8VyK6s/edit

5. Keep the OriginStory section below the talks.
6. REMOVE the Vision section.
7. Keep the photo gallery at the bottom.
title: Story page: talks/podcasts links above gallery in DocumentBadge style
